ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voltage_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage specification */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the voltage parameter */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the voltage parameter */,
  "conditions" INTEGER /* Conditions under which the voltage parameter is specified */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the voltage parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the voltage parameter */,
  "unit" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the voltage parameter */,
  "product_variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant the specification belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component for which the specification is defined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the specification was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_specifications_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_specifications_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("conditions") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltage_specifications_product_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the product variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product variant */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product variant was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product variant (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the variant belongs to */,
  "manufacturing_location" TEXT /* Location where the product is manufactured */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for manufacturing the product variant in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the variant details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., power, input/output) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, A, W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit (e.g., V, A, W) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., 1V = 1V) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., on pin VDDREG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., environmental, operational) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spec_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage specification that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES voltage_specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage specification being reviewed for compliance */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Industry standard or regulation being checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the compliance document or report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES voltage_specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage specification the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., compliance, performance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES voltage_specifications ("spec_id")
)
